attributes.description: Low-level eBPF telemetry from the GPU pipeline and CPU scheduler. Requires the RigSignal eBPF daemon running with kernel tracing enabled.

embeddableConfig.content:
## Engine & Diagnostics
Low-level eBPF telemetry from the GPU pipeline and CPU scheduler. These panels require the RigSignal eBPF daemon running with kernel tracing enabled. Use the game and driver filters to isolate a specific configuration. Correlate GPU fence spikes with frame-time drops on **[Game Performance](/app/dashboards#/view/rigsignal-game-perf)**, and thermal throttle on **[System Health](/app/dashboards#/view/rigsignal-system-health)**.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "gpu_fence"
| STATS `Avg GPU Fence Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_avg_us)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "gpu_fence"
| STATS `Avg GPU Fence Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_avg_us)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "gpu_sched"
| STATS `Avg GPU Sched Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_avg_us)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "gpu_sched"
| STATS `Avg GPU Sched Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_avg_us)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "schedlatency"
| STATS `Avg Runqueue Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_avg_us)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "schedlatency"
| STATS `Avg Runqueue Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_avg_us)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "bio"
| STATS `Avg I/O Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_avg_us)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "bio"
| STATS `Avg I/O Latency (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_avg_us)

embeddableConfig.content:
### Avg Futex Latency
_Field unavailable_

`futex` latency fields are not present in the live eBPF mapping.

### Avg Stutter Severity
_Field unavailable_

`stutter` severity fields are not present in the live eBPF mapping.

embeddableConfig.title: GPU Pipeline Latency Over Time — Avg GPU Fence & Sched Latency (µs)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe IN ("gpu_fence", "gpu_sched")
| STATS `GPU Fence Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_avg_us), `GPU Sched Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_avg_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe IN ("gpu_fence", "gpu_sched")
| STATS `GPU Fence Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_avg_us), `GPU Sched Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_avg_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

embeddableConfig.title: CPU Scheduler Latency Over Time — Runqueue Avg & Max (µs)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "schedlatency"
| STATS `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_avg_us), `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_max_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "schedlatency"
| STATS `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_avg_us), `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_max_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `CCX Cross Migrations` = SUM(rigsignal.ebpf.migration.ccx_cross_count), `Total Migrations` = SUM(rigsignal.ebpf.migration.total_count) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `CCX Cross Migrations` = SUM(rigsignal.ebpf.migration.ccx_cross_count), `Total Migrations` = SUM(rigsignal.ebpf.migration.total_count) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "bio"
| STATS `BIO Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_avg_us), `BIO Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_max_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "bio"
| STATS `BIO Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_avg_us), `BIO Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_max_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

embeddableConfig.title: VFS Read and Write Average Latency Over Time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "vfs"
| STATS `VFS Read Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.read.latency_avg_us), `VFS Write Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.write.latency_avg_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "vfs"
| STATS `VFS Read Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.read.latency_avg_us), `VFS Write Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.write.latency_avg_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

embeddableConfig.title: IRQ Latency Over Time — Hard IRQ and Soft IRQ Average Latency (µs)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "irq"
| STATS `Hard IRQ Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.irq.hard_irq.latency_avg_us), `Soft IRQ Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.irq.softirq.latency_avg_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE rigsignal.ebpf.probe == "irq"
| STATS `Hard IRQ Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.irq.hard_irq.latency_avg_us), `Soft IRQ Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.irq.softirq.latency_avg_us) BY `time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

embeddableConfig.content:
### Futex Contention Over Time
_Field unavailable_

`futex` contention fields are not present in the live eBPF mapping. This panel will be populated once the RigSignal eBPF daemon exposes futex probe data.

### Stutter Severity Score Over Time
_Field unavailable_

`stutter` severity score fields are not present in the live eBPF mapping. This panel will be populated once stutter scoring is enabled in the RigSignal daemon.

embeddableConfig.title: Engine Profile per Session — Latency & Migration Metrics (sorted by GPU Fence Avg DESC)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS
    `GPU Fence Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_avg_us),
    `GPU Fence Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_max_us),
    `GPU Sched Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_avg_us),
    `GPU Sched Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_max_us),
    `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_avg_us),
    `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_max_us),
    `CCX Cross Max` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.migration.ccx_cross_count),
    `BIO Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_avg_us),
    `BIO Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_max_us),
    `VFS Read Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.read.latency_avg_us),
    `VFS Write Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.write.latency_avg_us)
    BY `Session ID` = rigsignal.session.id
| SORT `GPU Fence Avg (µs)` DESC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS
    `GPU Fence Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_avg_us),
    `GPU Fence Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_fence.latency_max_us),
    `GPU Sched Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_avg_us),
    `GPU Sched Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.gpu_sched.latency_max_us),
    `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_avg_us),
    `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.runqueue.latency_max_us),
    `CCX Cross Max` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.migration.ccx_cross_count),
    `BIO Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_avg_us),
    `BIO Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf.bio.latency_max_us),
    `VFS Read Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.read.latency_avg_us),
    `VFS Write Avg (µs)` = AVG(rigsignal.ebpf.vfs.write.latency_avg_us)
    BY `Session ID` = rigsignal.session.id
| SORT `GPU Fence Avg (µs)` DESC

attributes.title: RigSignal: Engine & Diagnostics
